response.global_analysis: The video features two songs by La+ Darknesss and Kazama Iroha. I confirmed the Reference JSON provided the wrong lyrics for 'ホントノワタシ' (it contained a song by Milky Bunny instead of Kazama Iroha's original), so I ignored the JSON for that segment and transcribed the correct lyrics from the audio and on-screen cues. For '興味ないよ', the JSON was a partial snippet, so I transcribed the full performance. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset.

subtitles.original: 傷付いたって知らない様ね
subtitles.english: You don't seem to notice even if I'm hurt

subtitles.original: 責任逃れ
subtitles.english: Avoiding responsibility

subtitles.original: 「私はなんで好きなんだ？」って問い出す流れ
subtitles.english: "Why do I like you?" The flow of questioning that

subtitles.original: 最低なあなたへ
subtitles.english: To you, who's the worst

subtitles.original: あの子のほうがいいんだもんね
subtitles.english: Since that other girl is better for you

subtitles.original: アタシ興味ないよ、キミなんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in you

subtitles.original: マジ半端ないね
subtitles.english: You're really half-hearted

subtitles.original: 舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Such a sloppy imitation

subtitles.original: ポップでキッチュなこの愛に
subtitles.english: I hope I get destroyed by this

subtitles.original: 壊されりゃいい
subtitles.english: Pop and kitschy love

subtitles.original: ha-ha-ha-ha
subtitles.english: Ha-ha-ha-ha

subtitles.original: 止めないよ キミの愛を 独り占めしたい
subtitles.english: I won't stop, I want to keep your love to myself

subtitles.original: 得だろうが 何だろうが 抱きしめてあげたい
subtitles.english: Whatever the profit, I want to hold you

subtitles.original: ライセンス契約 独占のフォールインラブ
subtitles.english: A license agreement, an exclusive fall in love

subtitles.original: 逃がさない ずっと
subtitles.english: I'll never let you go, forever

subtitles.original: 「キミが好き」って この感情に騙されてる
subtitles.english: "I like you," I'm being deceived by this feeling

subtitles.original: 大事な方はキミかアタシか 決め兼ねてる
subtitles.english: I can't decide if you or I am more important

subtitles.original: バカすぎるキミへ
subtitles.english: To you, who's too foolish

subtitles.original: アタシ興味ないよ、キミなんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in you

subtitles.original: ほら振り回して 好きなだけ
subtitles.english: Look, keep me dangling as much as you like

subtitles.original: ロックでビターなこの愛を
subtitles.english: Because I won't give away...

subtitles.original: 渡さないから
subtitles.english: ...this rock and bitter love

subtitles.original: バカだよね 色ボケだね
subtitles.english: You're a fool, aren't you? Blinded by love

subtitles.original: それ見たことか 片付かもう
subtitles.english: See, I told you so! It's settled

subtitles.original: もう他でもない
subtitles.english: Now, it's nobody else...

subtitles.original: あなたに呪われたまま
subtitles.english: ...but you, as I remain cursed

subtitles.original: アタシ興味ないよ、キミなんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in you

subtitles.original: バカなフリして あげただけ
subtitles.english: I was just pretending to be a fool

subtitles.original: 愛と愛をぶつけ合って
subtitles.english: Crashing our loves together...

subtitles.original: ぐちゃぐちゃになって
subtitles.english: ...and getting all messy

subtitles.original: アタシ興味ないよ、キミなんて
subtitles.english: I'm not interested in you

subtitles.original: マジ半端ないね
subtitles.english: You're really half-hearted

subtitles.original: 舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Such a sloppy imitation

subtitles.original: ポップでキッチュなこの愛に
subtitles.english: I hope I get destroyed by this...

subtitles.original: 壊されりゃいい
subtitles.english: ...pop and kitschy love

subtitles.original: ha-ha-ha-ha
subtitles.english: Ha-ha-ha-ha

subtitles.original: 見た目だけじゃワカラナイ
subtitles.english: You can't tell just by looking

subtitles.original: ワタシのこと可愛いだけと
subtitles.english: You don't think I'm just cute...

subtitles.original: まさか思っていないよね？
subtitles.english: ...do you?

subtitles.original: ワタシの真実（ホント） 知っていてほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to know my truth

subtitles.original: 予測誤差の範囲と 物理的自尊心も
subtitles.english: Within the range of prediction error and self-esteem

subtitles.original: 厭わない オズモシスベースでいるけど
subtitles.english: I don't mind, staying on an osmosis base...

subtitles.original: 心は常に青白く燃え
subtitles.english: ...but my heart is always burning pale blue

subtitles.original: 諦めはしない 媚びたりもしない
subtitles.english: I won't give up, I won't flatter

subtitles.original: 私 おまけじゃない
subtitles.english: I'm not just an extra

subtitles.original: 扱いにくい奴共の 甘く見ると
subtitles.english: If you underestimate those difficult ones...

subtitles.original: 痛い目見るぞ
subtitles.english: ...you'll have a painful time

subtitles.original: それでも 時には 逃げ出してしまいたい
subtitles.english: Even so, sometimes I just want to run away

subtitles.original: そんな衝動に 弱音吐き出す夜もある
subtitles.english: There are nights when I let out my weaknesses

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな 小さな妥協が
subtitles.english: Just a tiny, tiny compromise...

subtitles.original: 積み重なり 重なって 動けない
subtitles.english: ...piling up until I can't move

subtitles.original: 大きな 大きな可能性を背負い
subtitles.english: Carrying large, large possibilities on my back...

subtitles.original: 未来も狭めてしまうから
subtitles.english: ...because it will narrow the future too

subtitles.original: どんなに苦しくても 辛くても
subtitles.english: No matter how painful or hard it gets,

subtitles.original: 後悔だけはしない
subtitles.english: I won't regret it

subtitles.original: 生き様を追い求めて 邪魔じゃなくて 生き方なんだ
subtitles.english: Seeking my way of life, it's my way

subtitles.original: 現実との 距離を縮められたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if the distance from reality is shortened...

subtitles.original: オズモシスベースでいるだけ
subtitles.english: ...I'm just staying on an osmosis base

subtitles.original: 何事もなかったかのように
subtitles.english: As if nothing happened

subtitles.original: 立ち止まりはしない 後戻りもしない
subtitles.english: I won't stop, I won't go back

subtitles.original: 夢も捨てない
subtitles.english: I won't throw away my dreams either
